/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmeshmonk.so -o libmeshmonk.so CMakeFiles/meshmonk_shared.dir/src/BaseCorrespondenceFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_shared.dir/src/CorrespondenceFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_shared.dir/src/Downsampler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_shared.dir/src/InlierDetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_shared.dir/src/NeighbourFinder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_shared.dir/src/NonrigidRegistration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_shared.dir/src/PyramidNonrigidRegistration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_shared.dir/src/RigidRegistration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_shared.dir/src/RigidTransformer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_shared.dir/src/ScaleShifter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_shared.dir/src/SymmetricCorrespondenceFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_shared.dir/src/ViscoElasticTransformer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_shared.dir/src/helper_functions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meshmonk_shared.dir/meshmonk.cpp.o  openmesh_install/lib/libOpenMeshCore.a
